'''Janna Pallask''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an undercover agent for [[House Pelagia]] and was an associate of [[Pellas Agri]] ("Coros Telari"). She was involved in attempts to recover a file that would potentially reveal [[House Mecetti]]'s involvement in anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activities. Janna was an intense, honest and idealistic woman who was totally dedicated to House Pelagia.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Mecetti File|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
